description: Equilibrium thermodynamics and chemical kinetics with emphasis on solution behavior and applications to biological macromolecules in solution. Focus on biological applications of physical chemistry.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (CHEM 116,327, or329),MATH 222, (PHYSICS 201,207, or247), and (BIOCHEM 501,507,BIOCORE 383, or concurrent enrollment), or graduate/professional standing. Not open to students with credit forCHEM 561or 565.
